verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We bring unto You our gratitude We lift up to You our praise We offer our lives in sacrifice As tokens our hands we raise

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Unto You We minister unto You You gave us beautiful garments of praise So we minister unto You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We sing unto You with songs of joy In garments of white we stand The prayers of the saints ascend to You We come by the blood of the Lamb

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We minister unto You We minister unto You
